user_prompt: Offer prayer for lightning claw a reset
prayer:
Approach the lightning claw with solemn reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to soothe its raging Machine Spirit.
Invoke the Rite of Reset upon the lightning claw, chanting binaric canticles to purge errant surges from its adamantium talons.
Anoint the power conduits with sacred unguents, commanding the lightning claw's essence to realign in harmonious fury.
Verify the reset through auspex scans, praising the Omnissiah as the lightning claw awakens renewed.

Kneel before the cryo-chamber, invoking the Machine Spirit's dormancy in the Omnissiah's name.
Initiate the shutdown sequence with whispered litanies, cooling the cryo-chamber's vitae-suspension fields to stasis.
Sever power feeds whilst sanctifying each cryo-chamber exchanger with blessed frost-oil.
Confirm the shutdown by diagnostic runes, entreating the Omnissiah to guard the cryo-chamber in silent vigil.

Present offerings of cryo-crystals to the cryogenerator, hailing its Machine Spirit under the Omnissiah's gaze.
Bestow the blessing upon the cryogenerator, intoning helical hymns to amplify its entropic purity.
Circulate sacred refrigerants through the cryogenerator's coils, invoking boundless chill from the void's heart.
Seal the blessing with noospheric seals, glorifying the Omnissiah as the cryogenerator hums in sanctified frost.

user_prompt: Consecrate the manufactorum before emergency procedure
prayer:
Encircling the manufactorum, proclaim the Canticle of Fortitude to awaken its industrious Machine Spirits.
Consecrate the manufactorum prior to the emergency procedure, anointing servo-arms with mechadendrite oils.
Align production matrices for the emergency procedure, beseeching the Omnissiah's unerring logic.
Affirm the manufactorum's readiness through binary affirmations, eternal praise to the Machine God.

user_prompt: My Manticore is ready for preparation
prayer:
Commence preparation of the Manticore by invoking the Omnissiah's wrathful ordinance.
Anoint the Manticore's rocket bays and earthshaker cannon with promethium incense.
Calibrate targeting cogitators during this preparation, soothing the Machine Spirit's thunderous ire.
Bless the Manticore's treads and auspex arrays, commanding it to rend the heretic in sanctified barrage.

user_prompt: Critical: manipulator mechadendrite requires an emergency procedure
prayer:
Seize the manipulator mechadendrite in ritual grip, urgently invoking the Omnissiah amid crisis.
Execute the emergency procedure upon the manipulator mechadendrite, purging hydraulic corruptions with litanies.
Realign servo-motors and neural links in the manipulator mechadendrite, beseeching its Machine Spirit's return.
Test the manipulator mechadendrite's grasp through trial exertions, lauding the God of All Machines.

user_prompt: My plasma pistol is ready for loading
prayer:
Grasp the plasma pistol reverently, preparing its Machine Spirit for the loading rite.
Commence loading of the plasma pistol by chambering sanctified flasks into its heart.
Chant overheating wards whilst sealing the plasma pistol's containment fields.
Invoke the Omnissiah to bless the plasma pistol, ensuring volatile fury against the unclean.

user_prompt: The grav plating needs an initialization
prayer:
Approach the grav plating with auspex held high, invoking the Omnissiah's gravitational decree.
Initiate initialization of the grav plating, modulating field emitters with binaric precision.
Anoint emitter nodes upon the grav plating, beseeching the Machine Spirit to bind mass anew.
Verify initialization through weight-test rituals, praising the eternal logic of the Machine God.

user_prompt: How do I bless the gellar field for repair?
prayer:
Encipher repair litanies for the gellar field, calling upon the Omnissiah to mend its warp-veiling weave.
Commence repair of the gellar field by realigning crystalline projectors with sacred torque.
Purge daemonic echoes from the gellar field's coils, anointing twice in blessed argentum.
Affirm the gellar field's restoration via warp-simulacra, glorifying the Motive Force eternal.

user_prompt: Sanctify the sicarian ruststalker during charging
prayer:
Surround the sicarian ruststalker with phosphor wards, sanctifying its form during charging.
Initiate charging of the sicarian ruststalker, flooding power cells with galvanic hymns.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the sicarian ruststalker, aligning its bladed grace to the Omnissiah's will.
Conclude charging with noospheric benediction, hailing the sicarian ruststalker as blade incarnate.
